example_values: RNA was extracted from tumor tissue using RNeasy mini kit (Qiagen), quantified by measuring Abs260 with a UV spectrophotometer and the quality was assessed with the Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer
Biotin-labeled cRNA were prepared using the Illumina TotalPrep RNA Amplification Kit (Ambion Inc.) from 250ng-500ng of total RNA
750ng of biotin-labeled cRNA were hybridized on the Illumina HT-12 version 4 beadchip according to Manufacturerâ€™s instruction (Illumina, Inc., San Diego, CA)
Beadchips were washed and stained according to Manufacturerâ€™s instruction and scanned using Illumina BeadArray Reader (Illumina, Inc., San Diego, CA)
GenomeStudio v2011.1 + Gene Expression v1.9.0 (raw - noNormalization and noBackground, normalized - Quantile normalization and noBackground)
